name: Okra with Tomatoes
recipeIngredient: 2 medium Onions - peeled, cut into 3/4-inch dice
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the okra and trim it by cutting off a small section at the tip; aim for a conical stem end.
2. Heat olive oil in a 10- to 12-inch skillet over medium flame.
3. Add garlic and onions, stirring until onions become translucent; reduce heat if needed.
4. Incorporate the okra and stir-fry for another minute.
5. Add all remaining ingredients along with about half a cup of water; bring mixture to a simmer.
6. Cover and turn the heat to low; gently cook for 15 to 20 minutes, or until the okra is tender (larger pods may require longer cooking).
7. Serve hot or cold.
